review_notes: The functions provided accurately map to Kubernetes security controls relevant to ISO27001 A.12.6, which focuses on technical vulnerability management. The function names follow the prescribed naming conventions, are descriptive, specific, and clearly indicate the security checks being performed. Each function aligns with the objective of reducing the attack surface and enforcing least privilege, which are key aspects of vulnerability management.
title: Technical Vulnerability Management
step1_reasoning: The ISO27001 A.12.6 control focuses on technical vulnerability management, which includes ensuring that systems are not exposed to unnecessary risks. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed by implementing NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring RBAC is configured to prevent over-privileged access, and enforcing pod security contexts to prevent running containers as root. These measures help mitigate vulnerabilities by reducing the attack surface and enforcing least privilege.
